title: lastrea glanduligera var. koreana
intro: Lastrea glanduligera var. koreana, also known as the Korean fern, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia, specifically in China and Korea, belonging to the Dryopteridaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lastrea glanduligera var. koreana include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of administration to harness its medicinal benefits.
